verse: Mind is the forerunner of all states. Mind is chief; mind-made are they.
translation: Everything you experience starts with your perspective. Your mental health isn't just about what happens to you, but how you frame it. Change your internal narrative to change your reality.

verse: Hatred is never appeased by hatred in this world. By non-hatred alone is hatred appeased. This is a law eternal.
translation: Reacting to toxicity with more toxicity only breeds a loop of suffering. Radical empathy and setting boundaries with kindness is the only way to break the cycle.

verse: Better than a thousand hollow words, is one word that brings peace.
translation: In an era of information overload, silence and meaningful communication are luxuries. Prioritize depth over volume in your interactions.
